nodes.name: Yahoo Finance
nodes.notes: RapidAPI Yahoo Finance — same key from your original workflow

parameters.text:
==📅 Weekly Portfolio Digest
https://portfolio.bobbydionido.com/weekly

MooMoo SG: S${{ Math.round($('Calculate Weekly').first().json.total_value).toLocaleString() }} ({{ $('Calculate Weekly').first().json.sg_wow >= 0 ? '+S$' : '-S$' }}{{ Math.abs(Math.round($('Calculate Weekly').first().json.sg_wow)) }} this week)
PERA+: ₱{{ Math.round($('Calculate Weekly').first().json.pera_total_val).toLocaleString() }} ({{ $('Calculate Weekly').first().json.pera_wow >= 0 ? '+₱' : '-₱' }}{{ Math.abs(Math.round($('Calculate Weekly').first().json.pera_wow)) }} this week)

🏆 Top movers:
{{ $('Calculate Weekly').first().json.top3.map(r => r.n + ' ' + (r.wow_val >= 0 ? '▲' : '▼') + ' ' + (r.wow_val >= 0 ? '+' : '') + 'S$' + Math.round(r.wow_val)).join('\n') }}
